title: ilex tectonica
intro: Ilex tectonica, also known as the "American Holly", is a species of flowering plant in the family Aquifoliaceae, native to the southeastern United States. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its berries, which contain ilicin, a compound that has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ilex tectonica include its potential to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Ilex tectonica is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
